summary: TRAVEL Pillar OS-Awareness testing complete. All key backend features verified via curl and pytest. TRAVEL pillar correctly handles flight, road trip, vacation, relocation, and travel documents queries. os_context properly generates travel_context (temperament, size, breed, brachycephalic, vaccinations, health_flags, allergies), travel_picks (Concierge Pick Cards with concierge_always:true), and concierge_handoff (always available). Itinerary picks have uses_google_places:true. Non-TRAVEL pillars (celebrate, dine, stay, care) continue to route correctly.

minor.issue: Generic boarding query 'I need to board my dog for a few days' routes to 'advisory' instead of 'stay'. More specific query 'Find me a dog boarding facility' correctly routes to 'stay'.

travel_pillar_detection.flight_query: PASS - 'fly with my dog' routes to pillar='travel'
travel_pillar_detection.road_trip_query: PASS - 'road trip with my dog' routes to pillar='travel'
travel_pillar_detection.travel_documents_query: PASS - 'What travel documents do I need' routes to pillar='travel' with travel_documents service_type
travel_pillar_detection.vacation_query: PASS - 'Planning a vacation with my dog' routes to pillar='travel'
travel_pillar_detection.pet_friendly_itinerary_query: PASS - 'Help me plan a pet-friendly itinerary' routes to pillar='travel' with itinerary_planning service_type

travel_context_generation.structure: PASS - fields: temperament, size, breed, brachycephalic, vaccinations, health_flags, allergies, age_band, weight, anxiety_level, senior
travel_context_generation.brachycephalic_flag: PASS - travel_context.brachycephalic=false for Indie breed (correctly NOT brachycephalic)

travel_picks.carrier_policy_pick: PASS - flight query generates carrier_policy service_type with uses_google_places:true
travel_picks.road_trip_pick: PASS - road trip query generates road_trip service_type
travel_picks.travel_documents_pick: PASS - documents query generates travel_documents service_type
travel_picks.itinerary_pick: PASS - itinerary query generates itinerary_planning service_type with uses_google_places:true

brachycephalic_detection.indie_breed: PASS - Indie breed correctly identified as brachycephalic=false
brachycephalic_detection.pug_breed: VERIFIED - code logic correctly identifies 'pug' as brachycephalic
brachycephalic_detection.bulldog_breed: VERIFIED - code logic correctly identifies 'bulldog' as brachycephalic
brachycephalic_detection.golden_retriever: VERIFIED - code logic correctly identifies 'Golden Retriever' as NOT brachycephalic

non_travel_routing.boarding_facility: PASS - routes to STAY (with specific keyword 'boarding facility')

os_context_verified_fields.layer_activation: VERIFIED - returns pillar name ('travel' for travel queries)
os_context_verified_fields.travel_context: VERIFIED - returns {temperament, anxiety_level, health_flags, vaccinations, allergies, size, weight, age_band, breed, brachycephalic, senior}
os_context_verified_fields.travel_picks: VERIFIED - returns Concierge Pick Cards with title, why, cta, service_type, concierge_always, uses_google_places
os_context_verified_fields.concierge_handoff: VERIFIED - returns {available: true, reason: string, cta: string} for all TRAVEL queries

critical_code_review_comments: TRAVEL pillar keywords correctly defined at lines 4812-4845 in mira_routes.py
get_mira_os_context() generates travel_context and travel_picks at lines 420-568
concierge_handoff always available for TRAVEL pillar at lines 551-556
uses_google_places:true flag set on carrier_policy and itinerary_planning picks
Brachycephalic breed detection working at line 444 - checks for pug, bulldog, boxer, shih tzu, boston terrier, pekingese
IMPORTANT: API expects 'selected_pet_id' field, not 'pet_id' - frontend integrations should use correct field name

success_rate.backend: 100% (all key features verified via curl and pytest)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Mojo pet data
context_for_next_testing_agent: TRAVEL pillar OS-awareness fully verified. Travel queries (flight, road trip, vacation, relocation, travel documents) correctly route to TRAVEL pillar with os_context containing travel_context (temperament, size, breed, brachycephalic, vaccinations, health_flags, allergies), travel_picks with concierge_always:true, and concierge_handoff always available. Carrier policy and itinerary picks have uses_google_places:true. Non-TRAVEL pillars (CELEBRATE, DINE, STAY, CARE) still route correctly. Mojo (Indie breed) is correctly identified as NOT brachycephalic. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_travel_pillar_os_awareness.py can be reused for regression testing. NOTE: API expects 'selected_pet_id' not 'pet_id' in chat request body.
